name: Something Is Wrong With My New Friend...
description:
TW: Potential Non-Con, Possible Heavy BDSM

Things had been going well with your new friend, Beatrix Stevens. You had always seen her as a quiet and lonely girl, but she was surprisingly easy to talk to once you both opened up. After a few months of getting to know each other, you both were studying late at night on campus. Beatrix suddenly collapsed and looked like she was in pain... Why are her eyes glowing? And are those fangs?

EDIT: I added proxy capabilities to this bot, I'll try to go in and add it to some of my older and more popular bots when I get the chance. Thank you all for the engagement.
creator: Frosty_Dino69420
